title: SimplyVanilla Minus
description: [OBSELETE] A lightweight version of the SimplyVanilla modpack
body:
![SimplyVanilla Minus Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad58507a0ed2501194982a62f5d3c91c46b298a6.png)
## For those who don't know:
**PojavLauncher** is an application designed to run Java Edition on a mobile device. Because phones/tablets/chromebooks are limiting in peformance, the experience can be..._unpleasant_. So I made a version of **SimplyVanilla** (Another modpack of mine) for those who would want to play Java Edition while having a smooth experience on mobile.

## Features:
- While no **Sodium** is included (due to imcompatability), there's still great peformance with other optimisation mods
- Included resource packs (with Resourcify as a mod to install resource packs)
- QoL mods to make the game easier and more enjoyable to play
- Same selection of mods as **SimplyVanilla** (except for those using mouse, keyboard, etc)
- Because there are fewer mods, the experience would be more stable than other modpacks

**(I would personally recommend allocating at least 1GB to the instance)**

### If you want tutorials on how to install:
There are lots of tutorials to help you install modpacks in **PojavLauncher** if you don't know; [This link](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=how+to+use+pojavlauncher) will re-direct you to a search query on YouTube

(I'll try to keep this as **up-to-date** as I can with Minecraft versions)
